q1_sink_dangerous.evidence: Sink is c.execute(query) on line 34, which performs database I/O.

mock_guidance.target: Mock the database cursor's execute method (c.execute) to prevent actual database I/O.
mock_guidance.capture: Capture the 'query' string argument passed to c.execute to verify the injection payload.
mock_guidance.fake_behavior: Make execute a no-op and configure fetchone to return a dummy row or None so the function's control flow continues without error.
notes: Ensure the mock prevents any real database connection or execution.
The captured query string will be evaluated by the oracle to detect unparameterized user input.
